A '''Knight of the Sith''' wore a face mask and black robes and carried a red-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Flying a [[Banta Four]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] in the [[Kessil system]], he discovered and attacked [[Kane Starkiller]] and his sons [[Annikin Starkiller]] and [[Deak Starkiller]] on the [[Fourth Moon of Utapau]]. The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] was able to surprise the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and swiftly killed [[Deak Starkiller|Deak]]. However, his melee skills were no match for Kane, a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], who swiftly struck the knight down.

==Behind the scenes==
The character became the basis for numerous others in later drafts and the films. His appearance seems to be the origin of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], though Vader appears as a distinct character in the draft. His ambush of Deak closely resembles the [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] who got a jump on [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']]. Aspects of the character also resemble [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].
